open_app_via_run.description: Open an application via Win+R Run dialog

approaches.notes: Wait 0.5s after Win+R for the Run dialog to gain focus.

navigate_to_url.description: Navigate browser to a specific URL

approaches.notes: Ctrl+L focuses the address bar in all major browsers.
Switches to the most recently used window.
May trigger save dialog in some apps.
Works in all major browsers. Focus lands on address bar.
Also works in many editors and file managers.

search_in_page.description: Find text on the current page

approaches.notes: Press Enter or F3 to cycle through matches.

copy_paste.description: Copy selected content and paste it

approaches.notes: Content must be selected first. Paste goes to focused input.

git_push_to_remote.description: Push local git commits to a remote repository

failure_modes: remote contains work not present locally -- must pull or force-push
approaches.notes: First attempt failed because remote had diverged (force-pushed to 'Initial commit'). Resolved with git push --force. Always check remote state first.
Use only when remote was reset/wiped and local has the authoritative history. Destructive -- overwrites remote.
Opens classic Command Prompt. Use 'wt' for Windows Terminal.
Opens Windows Terminal if installed. Falls back to error if not present.

select_all_text.description: Select all text in the current input or document

approaches.notes: Works in most apps. In browsers, selects all page content.
Universal undo. Press multiple times to undo further back.

save_file.description: Save the current file or document

approaches.notes: In new/unsaved files, opens Save As dialog.

scroll_page.description: Scroll through a page or document

approaches.notes: Scrolls one viewport height down. Use pageup for reverse.

failure_modes: Types a space if focus is on an input field
approaches.notes: Browser-only. Scrolls down like PageDown. Shift+Space scrolls up.

navigation_patterns.file_list: Files appear as Hyperlinks with name and (File) or (Directory) role
navigation_patterns.tabs: Code, Issues, Pull Requests, Actions etc. are tab links

accessibility_notes.skip_to_content: First tabbable element is 'Skip to content'
accessibility_notes.editor: Uses CodeMirror or Monaco for code editing

anti_patterns.description: Do not tab-sweep inside video players -- they create keyboard focus traps
anti_patterns.context: YouTube, Vimeo, and embedded video players capture keyboard focus for media controls

anti_patterns.description: Do not type into search bars without verifying focus first -- keystrokes may go to wrong target
anti_patterns.context: Some pages steal focus on load, redirecting typed text to unexpected inputs

anti_patterns.description: Always check remote state before git push -- remote may have been force-pushed or reset independently
anti_patterns.context: First push attempt failed because remote was reset to 'Initial commit'. git pull --rebase caused modify/delete conflicts on every file. Resolved by aborting rebase and force-pushing.

anti_patterns.description: Do not git pull --rebase when remote history was rewritten -- it creates impossible conflicts. Use git push --force if local is authoritative.
anti_patterns.context: Rebase attempted to replay local commits on top of a wiped remote, causing modify/delete conflicts on files that existed locally but were deleted in the remote's new history.
